title: Knicks Tracker
lede: Upcoming schedule and recent scoring performance for Jalen Brunson.

sections.title: Recent Scoring
sections.description: Brunson's points across the last five starts.

sections.title: Upcoming Schedule
sections.description: Next five fixtures for the New York Knicks.

demoSteps: Load the page to view static local fixtures.
Verify the L5 average calculates to exactly 31.2.
Verify the L3 average calculates to 33.7 and triggers the positive threshold highlight.
Check that the schedule table renders all five games accurately based on the local array.
notes: V1 uses a decoupled data architecture to easily swap in an API in V2.
Copy favours neutral, factual language as requested.
No predictive forecasting features are included; strict reliance on historicals.
